subscribe.metaDesc: Choose your HAZOREX cookie subscription plan. Delivered Mondays and Fridays only.
subscribe.title: Subscription Plans
subscribe.scheduleHint: Only Mondays and Fridays are selectable.

starter.title: Starter Plan
starter.desc: Perfect for essentials. Includes 2 deliveries per month on your choice of Mondays or Fridays. Add extra deliveries anytime for $10 each.

essential.title: Essential Plan
essential.desc: Our most popular choice. Enjoy up to 4 deliveries per month. Flexible scheduling: use them weekly, bi-weekly, or however fits your routine.

intermediate.title: Intermediate Plan
intermediate.desc: Extra flexibility for active households. Get up to 6 deliveries per month scheduled on Mondays or Fridays.

premium.title: Premium Plan
premium.desc: Full monthly coverage. Maximum convenience with up to 8 deliveries per month (twice a week on Mondays and Fridays).

trust.metaDesc: How HAZOREX protects your data: authentication, access controls, payments, data retention, subprocessors, and how to exercise your privacy rights.
trust.title: Privacy and security at HAZOREX
trust.intro: This page is maintained by the HAZOREX team to answer common questions about security and privacy. It is not an independent certification; it describes the controls currently active in the application and the shared responsibility among HAZOREX, our hosting platform (Lovable Cloud) and our users.

sections.authP1: Account access is done with email and password or Google sign-in. Passwords are never stored in plain text: credential management and verification is handled by the platform's managed authentication provider.
sections.authP2: Each user can only read and modify their own profile and their own orders, subscriptions and donations. Administrative roles are restricted and verified server-side.
sections.paymentsP1: Payments are processed through Stripe. HAZOREX does not store or have access to full card numbers, CVV or expiration dates: this data travels directly between your browser and Stripe using their secure elements.
sections.dataP1: We only collect data necessary to operate the application: your email, an optional display name, your shipping address when you make a physical purchase, and a history of orders, subscriptions and donations associated with your account.
sections.subprocessorsP1: To provide the service we rely on the following subprocessors: Lovable Cloud (hosting, database and authentication), Stripe (payment processing) and a transactional email provider. Each receives only the minimum data needed for its function.
sections.emailP1: We only send transactional emails (order, subscription and account-change confirmations). We do not run mass marketing campaigns. Each email includes an unsubscribe link that disables future sends to that address.
sections.retentionP1: We keep your data while your account is active. If you wish to delete your account or request deletion of your personal data, write to the site's contact email and we will process the request.
sections.reportTitle: How to report a security issue
sections.reportP1: If you believe you have found a vulnerability, please contact us before disclosing it publicly. We will investigate every responsible report and keep you updated on the status.
sections.sharedP1: The platform HAZOREX runs on provides infrastructure security, backups and data isolation. HAZOREX configures application-level controls (access policies, payment validation, email content). Users contribute by using unique passwords and keeping their email access secure.

terms.metaDesc: Terms and Conditions of HAZOREX Sweepstakes.
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.s1BodyPre: By using HAZOREX you accept these Terms and our
terms.s2Body: You must be at least 18. Stars purchases are available throughout the U.S. Sweepstakes entry is subject to the state exclusions in the Official Rules.
terms.s3Body: "Stars" are virtual credits with no monetary value outside the platform and are non-refundable except where required by law. A portion of each purchase is allocated to the global Prize Pool; the remainder funds platform operations. Specific financial breakdown is disclosed in the Official Sweepstakes Rules.
terms.s4BodyPre: No purchase is necessary to enter. See AMOE method in the
terms.s5Body: USD prizes paid via PayPal, Zelle or check to the verified winner. Subject to KYC verification and IRS W-9 per U.S. federal law. No additional cash equivalent. Non-transferable.
terms.s6Body: Service is provided "as is". No guarantee of uninterrupted availability or specific results.

sweepstakesRules.metaDesc: Official Rules of the daily HAZOREX Sweepstakes — no purchase necessary, U.S. residents 18+.
sweepstakesRules.title: Official Sweepstakes Rules
sweepstakesRules.addressPlaceholder: [MAILING ADDRESS TO BE FINALIZED — the sweepstakes is not yet active]
sweepstakesRules.preLaunchBodyPost: . These rules will be finalized on launch day.
sweepstakesRules.noPurchaseBanner: NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. A PURCHASE WILL NOT INCREASE YOUR CHANCES OF WINNING. VOID WHERE PROHIBITED.
sweepstakesRules.s2BodyPre: Open only to legal residents of the 50 United States and the District of Columbia who are
sweepstakesRules.s2BodyMid1: years of age or older at time of entry.
sweepstakesRules.s2BodyMid2: and where prohibited by law. Employees, contractors, directors, immediate family members (spouse, parents, children, siblings) and household members of the Sponsor, its affiliates, agencies and partners are not eligible.
sweepstakesRules.s3Body: Daily sweepstakes. Each "Daily Draw" begins at 12:00 AM Eastern Time (ET) and closes entries at 7:55 PM ET (5 minutes prior to the drawing). Winner is selected at 8:00 PM ET that same day.
sweepstakesRules.s4_1Body: Buy a "Stars" package and convert them to tickets at 10 Stars = 1 ticket.
sweepstakesRules.s4_2BodyPost: with your full legal name, U.S. mailing address, email, phone, date of birth (18+) and an original essay of at least 300 words. Each valid submission counts as 1 ticket with the same weight as a purchased ticket.
sweepstakesRules.s4MailBody: hand-write a postcard (no photocopy) with your complete details plus the phrase "FREE ENTRY HAZOREX SWEEPSTAKES [DATE]" and mail to: {{sponsor}}, AMOE Entry, {{address}}. Limit: 1 AMOE entry per person per day. Maximum 3 entries per IP address per day.
sweepstakesRules.s5BodyPre: The daily prize is the accumulated Prize Pool for the day in USD, funded by a portion of each Stars purchase plus rollover from unclaimed pools.
sweepstakesRules.s5BodyBold: Minimum guaranteed value: $25 USD. Maximum daily prize value: ${{maxPrize}} USD.
sweepstakesRules.s5BodyPost: Any amount above the cap automatically rolls into the next day's pool. No cash equivalent beyond the pool amount. Non-transferable.
sweepstakesRules.s6Body: Odds depend on the number of eligible entries received for each daily drawing.
sweepstakesRules.s7Body: The winner is selected at 8:00 PM ET via a deterministic ticket-weighted algorithm using a cryptographic seed (SHA-256) combining the draw date, total tickets and a random server UUID. The seed hash is published with each result for public verification.
sweepstakesRules.s8BodyPre: The winner will be notified by email within 24 hours and has
sweepstakesRules.s8BodyEnd: by providing: government-issued photo ID, signed IRS Form W-9 (required for prizes > $600 USD), mailing address and payment method (PayPal, Zelle or check). Unclaimed prizes roll over to the next drawing.
sweepstakesRules.s9Body: Winner is solely responsible for all federal, state, and local taxes. For aggregated prizes of $600 USD or more in a calendar year, Sponsor will issue IRS Form 1099-MISC.
sweepstakesRules.s10Body: By entering, participants release Sponsor, its affiliates, directors, employees and agents from any claims arising out of participation, acceptance, use or misuse of the prize.
sweepstakesRules.s11BodyPre: Personal data is used solely to administer the sweepstakes, verify eligibility, contact the winner and meet tax obligations. See our
sweepstakesRules.s12BodyPre: These Rules are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Parties agree to resolve disputes through individual binding arbitration in Wilmington, Delaware.
sweepstakesRules.s13BodyPost: or by written mail to the Sponsor for 90 days after each drawing.
sweepstakesRules.s14Body: Sponsor may modify, suspend or cancel the sweepstakes for cause (fraud, technical failure, force majeure). Material changes will be posted here.

repartidoresPage.metaDesc: Join the Hazorex driver team. Apply in minutes, choose your hours, and earn money delivering orders in your city.
repartidoresPage.metaOg: Apply as a Hazorex driver. Flexible hours, weekly payments, and a transparent approval process.

hero.subtitlePart1: You manage your time, we handle the orders. You just need a
hero.subtitlePart2: , a valid license, and the desire to hit the road.

signInGate.title: Start your application
signInGate.body: First, log in or create your Hazorex account. It's fast.

readyGate.title: Everything's ready for your application
readyGate.body: It takes ~5 minutes. Have your valid ID, license, and insurance handy.

vehicles.title: We only accept motorcycles or cars
vehicles.bodyPart1: To ensure fast deliveries and full coverage, at Hazorex
vehicles.bodyStrong: we only accept drivers on motorcycles or cars
vehicles.bodyPart2: . We do not accept deliveries on foot or by bicycle.
vehicles.hint: Choose yours below and we will only ask for the corresponding documents.

moto.label: Motorcycle
moto.desc: Ideal for heavy traffic. Faster deliveries.

auto.label: Car
auto.desc: Perfect for large orders and variable weather.

s1.title: Apply
s1.body: Complete your details, choose your vehicle, and upload the documents we ask for.

s2.title: We review you
s2.body: Our team verifies your information within 48 hours. We'll notify you by email.

s3.title: Start earning
s3.body: Once approved, set your availability and receive orders near you.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.r2: Own motorcycle or car (we do not accept on foot or by bicycle)
requirements.r3: Valid driver's license (Class A for motorcycle, Class B for car)

q1.q: Do I need to have my own vehicle?
q1.a: Yes. At Hazorex we only accept drivers on motorcycles or cars to ensure delivery times and zone coverage. We do not accept deliveries on foot or by bicycle.

q2.a: We will get back to you within 48 hours after you upload all your documents.

q3.a: Payments are processed weekly for the total of completed deliveries.

q4.a: Yes. You set your availability when you want to receive orders.

q5.a: Your documents are used solely to verify your identity and eligibility. They are stored in encrypted form and only the verification team has access. You can request their deletion at any time.

approved.title: You're approved as a Hazorex driver!
approved.body: Go to your dashboard to set your availability and start delivering.

pending.title: Application received
pending.body: We are reviewing your information. We will notify you by email within 48 hours.

inReview.title: Application under review
inReview.body: The team is verifying your documents. We will notify you by email soon.

rejected.title: Application rejected
rejected.body: You can write to us at soporte@hazorex.com to resolve the details and apply again.

suspended.title: Account suspended
suspended.body: Write to us at soporte@hazorex.com for more details.

identificacion.label: Official ID (state license, passport, or government ID)

casco.label: Photo of your DOT-approved helmet (motorcycle only)
casco.hint: jpg/png image of the helmet on or in front, max 5MB

step2.title: Vehicle
step2.subtitle: We only accept motorcycles or cars.

step3.title: Documents
step3.subtitle: All of the following documents are mandatory to complete your application (image or PDF, max 5MB).

privacy.body: They are used solely to verify your identity and eligibility. They are stored in encrypted form and only the verification team has access. You can request their deletion at any time by writing to soporte@hazorex.com. See also our

supportPage.metaDesc: Get in touch with the HAZOREX support team. Email us and browse FAQs about orders, delivery, subscriptions, and the sweepstakes.
supportPage.metaOg: We're here to help. Email us at soporte@hazorex.com.
supportPage.heroSubtitle: Our team is here to answer any questions about your orders, deliveries, subscription, or the daily sweepstakes.
supportPage.contactSubtitle: We reply during business hours, usually within 24 hours.

order.q: How do I place an order?
order.a: Pick your products in the shop, add them to your cart, and complete checkout. You'll receive a confirmation email with the details.

delivery.a: Delivery times depend on your area. You'll get email updates on your shipment status at every stage.

cancel.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancel.a: Go to your profile, open your active subscription, and click cancel. If you need help, email us at soporte@hazorex.com.

sweepstakes.q: How do I enter the daily sweepstakes?
sweepstakes.a: You can enter for free every day from the sweepstakes page. See the official rules at /sweepstakes-rules.

supportPage.footerPre: Didn't find what you were looking for? Email us at

privacyPage.metaDesc: Hazorex Privacy Policy: what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy

s1.title: 1. Who we are
s1.body: Hazorex ("we" or "the platform") operates the website {{domain}}. This policy explains what personal information we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have over it.

s2.title: 2. Data we collect
bullets: Account data: name, email address, and profile picture when you sign in (for example, with Google).
Usage data: pages visited, sweepstakes interactions, and notification preferences.
Technical data: IP address, browser type, and operating system, for security and diagnostic purposes.

s3.title: 3. How we use it
bullets: Let you take part in the daily sweepstakes.
Send you notifications you have opted in to.

s4.title: 4. Sign in with Google
s4.body: If you sign up with Google, we only receive your email, name, and profile picture. We do not access your Gmail, contacts, or any other data from your Google account.

s5.title: 5. Sharing information
s5.body: We do not sell your data. We only share it with providers that help us operate the platform (hosting, email delivery, analytics) and when required by law.

s6.title: 6. Your rights
s6.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time by writing to {{email}}.

s7.title: 7. Retention
s7.body: We keep your data while your account is active. If you delete your account, we erase your personal information except what is required to comply with legal obligations.

s8.title: 8. Changes
s8.body: We may update this policy. We will post any changes on this page and, if relevant, notify you.

s9.title: 9. Contact
s9.body: For any privacy questions: {{email}}.
